coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 54-group, 1,662-node closure.
validation: All five authored, diameter, screw, solid, and split-for-print cases have exact local bounds. Coplanar Manifold hull and boolean triangles are recombined into Blender-style panels; authored output is 1,770 / 1,914 versus Blender's 1,743 / 1,816, and every case remains within 2.82% vertices.
